descriptionEN: Scenario_13_CoDeSys.slx This interlocked simulation model integrates CoDeSys signals via OPC DA Read (Async), distributes them through Signal Expander to subsystems, executes processes in the Stempelanlage system, and reads back field data in the Sensoren system. It forms a closed-loop process: OPC Input → Unfolding/Interlocking → Process Execution → Output → OPC Feedback, designed for online debugging and visual verification with CoDeSys.

descriptionEN: This is a continuous-dynamics model of a two-link crane arm. Given physical parameters, the equation blocks compute the angular accelerations of joint 1 and joint 2, the arm’s rotational angular acceleration, and the vertical acceleration. Integrators then produce the corresponding angles/position and their velocities, forming the system’s state evolution. Thresholds and logic on the right detect steady-state or in-position conditions, and scopes with a time base are provided for observation and tuning.
